steps.action: Keep /model-assets.json and listed /models files in the exported static build.
steps.detail: MoveNet SinglePose Lightning is shipped as same-origin static assets before deployment.
steps.label: Package delivery

steps.action: Use the configured trigger while online before relying on offline analysis.
steps.detail: The model is vendored during build, then the service worker downloads same-origin model assets on first online install or explicit warmup.
steps.label: Download trigger
steps.timing: First online PWA install, app reload, or Warm model

steps.action: Warm the model cache while online.
steps.detail: Cache Storage still needs 3/3 model asset(s).
steps.label: Cache warmup

steps.action: Use browser Web Crypto SHA-256 support when available; otherwise rely on cache presence.
steps.detail: Runtime integrity verification is not available in this environment.
steps.label: Integrity check

steps.action: Warm the model online, then switch offline and run a local smoke.
steps.detail: Offline analysis depends on cached model assets being available on this device/browser.
steps.label: Offline use

summary.downloadTrigger: First online PWA install, app reload, or Warm model
summary.nextAction: Open the PWA online once or use Warm model to populate the cache.
